scene_summary: A single corporate employee delivers a verbose, buzzword-heavy explanation about why February's last week is 'better' than March's first week.

observations.likely_role: any LARP employee (the only one present)
signature_lines: just wanted to spotlight that this is the last week of February. So we are limited to just five business days.
we're effectively operating inside the terminal week of the monthly performance cycle, right?
So it becomes really quick. If I might clarify at a level, we are structurally inside the concluding chapter of this month's operational continuum.
observations.interpersonal_note: the sole speaker; no other characters appear in this clip
